headline: Defending Champions Ready to Take on Stacked Field at 48th Bank of America Chicago Marathon
summary: Returning Bank of America Chicago Marathon champions Jacob Kiplimo and Hawi Feysa will defend their titles against one of the deepest fields in race history on Sunday, October 11. Announced today, the professional athlete fields feature some of the sport's biggest stars, including Sharon Lokedi, Brigid Kosgei, Amos Kipruto and rising American Charles Hicks.

headline: Rollins shares plunge premarket after Q2 miss triggers downgrades
summary: Investing.com -- Rollins Inc. (NYSE: ROL) shares are down more than 18% premarket on Thursday after the pest control company reported second-quarter earnings after the close on Wednesday.

raw.headline: Rollins shares plunge premarket after Q2 miss triggers downgrades

headline: Bank of America and Carolina Panthers Extend Naming Rights for Bank of America Stadium, Reinforcing Long-Term Commitment to Charlotte and the Carolinas
summary: The Carolina Panthers and Bank of America today announced long-term extension of their naming rights agreement for Bank of America Stadium. The renewal builds on a decades-long relationship between two organizations deeply connected to Charlotte and the Carolinas, extending a naming rights partnership that has become one of the longest-running in the NFL.

headline: Why Bank Stocks May Beat REITs for Dividends
summary: Based on “shareholder yield,” which includes share buybacks, financials yield close to 5%, compared with less than 3% for REITs.

headline: Victoria's Secret (VSCO) Stock Sees Fair Value Lift After Analysts Back Turnaround
summary: Victoria's Secret now carries a higher internal fair value estimate of US$89.20, up from US$65.56. This aligns with the cluster of Street price targets in roughly the US$75 to US$99 range. Recent analyst commentary points to this reset as a reflection of stronger earnings confidence around the turnaround, brand execution, and the current retail setup into 2026. In the sections that follow, you will see how this shifting price target narrative is developing and what to watch to stay on top of...
